sections.paragraph:
Original: אז

Transliteration: 'âz

Phonetic: awz

BDB Definition:

  1. then, at that time
    1. temporal expressions
      1. then (past)
      2. then, if...then (future)
      3. earlier
    2. logical expressions
      1. in that case
      2. that (being so)

Origin: a demonstrative adv

TWOT entry: 54

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
